_comment: SD 1.5 fine-tune by ogkalu. V2 trains all 6 comic styles simultaneously; each style is activated by its own trigger word.
_comment_model: SD 1.5 fine-tune trained on Charlie Bo's comic artstyles (ogkalu/Comic-Diffusion).
_comment_trigger: Trigger word for this style: 'charliebo artstyle'. Must appear in your prompt.
_comment_steps: 20–30 steps sufficient for SD 1.5. More steps rarely improve comic-style outputs.
_comment_cfg: 7–8 recommended. Higher values increase style adherence but reduce prompt flexibility.
_comment_size: SD 1.5 native resolution is 512x512. 768x512 works well for landscape compositions.
